metadata.description: Claude Code skills, agents, and configuration — the parts worth sharing.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Process any source into a structured, compounding knowledge base with refresh capability

plugins.name: explain
plugins.description: Structured code explainer — layered explanations of files, functions, directories, or concepts

plugins.name: lineage
plugins.description: Trace column-level data lineage through SQL, Kafka, Spark, and JDBC codebases

plugins.name: orient
plugins.description: Topic-focused session orientation — search graph, knowledge, journal, and research for a specific topic

plugins.name: capture
plugins.description: Capture session information into a staging file for later reflection and knowledge graph processing

plugins.name: membrain
plugins.description: Graph-based agent memory — search, trace, and manage what your agent knows

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code review for a branch, PR, or path — structured output with severity labels and cross-file analysis

plugins.name: docgen
plugins.description: Generate or update README, API docs, architecture overview, or changelog — always confirms before writing

plugins.name: harness-share
plugins.description: Compile, export, import, and sync harness configurations across Claude Code, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot

plugins.name: open-pr
plugins.description: Pre-flight checks and PR creation workflow: run tests, open a PR, code review, and check CI

plugins.name: merge-pr
plugins.description: PR merge workflow: verify CI and review status, sync with base branch, confirm, squash merge, and clean up

plugins.name: pr-sweep
plugins.description: Cross-repo PR sweep: triage all open PRs, run code reviews, merge what's ready, fix quick CI blockers, and report

plugins.name: stats
plugins.description: Interactive dashboard for Claude Code usage — tokens, sessions, models, and activity patterns

plugins.name: iterm-notify
plugins.description: macOS desktop notifications and iTerm2 badge management for Claude Code lifecycle events.

plugins.name: board
plugins.description: Lightweight Kanban board with real-time Claude ↔ web UI two-way sync via MCP.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Production-grade frontend design skill that avoids AI slop — specific rules for typography, color (OKLCH), layout, motion, interaction, and UX writing.
